languages.text: [Передать сумку, набитую тронным золотом] "Я бы очень удивил{mf|ся|ась}. И немедленно попытал{mf|ся|ась} бы приобрести его".

traits.locale_text: [Передать сумку, набитую тронным золотом] "Я бы очень удивил{mf|ся|ась}. И немедленно попытал{mf|ся|ась} бы приобрести его".

languages.text: [Give her a purse heavy with thrones] "I would be very surprised indeed. And I would be eager to purchase it."
languages.original_text: [Передать сумку, набитую тронным золотом] "Я бы очень удивил{mf|ся|ась}. И немедленно попытал{mf|ся|ась} бы приобрести его".

traits.locale_text: [Give her a purse heavy with thrones] "I would be very surprised indeed. And I would be eager to purchase it."

[Give her a purse heavy with thrones] "I would be very surprised indeed. And I would be eager to purchase it."

languages.text: [Lui donner une bourse remplie de trônes] « Ça me surprendrait, effectivement, et je me ferais un plaisir d'acheter cette information. »
languages.original_text: [Give her a purse heavy with thrones] "I would be very surprised indeed. And I would be eager to purchase it."

traits.locale_text: [Lui donner une bourse remplie de trônes] « Ça me surprendrait, effectivement, et je me ferais un plaisir d'acheter cette information. »

languages.text: [Geben Sie ihr einen Geldbeutel voller Throne] "Ich wäre wirklich sehr überrascht. Und ich wäre begierig, sie zu kaufen."
languages.original_text: [Give her a purse heavy with thrones] "I would be very surprised indeed. And I would be eager to purchase it."

traits.locale_text: [Geben Sie ihr einen Geldbeutel voller Throne] "Ich wäre wirklich sehr überrascht. Und ich wäre begierig, sie zu kaufen."

languages.text: [Dale un monedero cargado de tronos] "Me sorprendería mucho. Y estaría ansioso por comprarlo".
languages.original_text: [Give her a purse heavy with thrones] "I would be very surprised indeed. And I would be eager to purchase it."

traits.locale_text: [Dale un monedero cargado de tronos] "Me sorprendería mucho. Y estaría ansioso por comprarlo".

languages.text: [Ona tahtlarla dolu bir çanta verin]. "Gerçekten çok şaşırırdım. Ve onu satın almak için can atardım."
languages.original_text: [Give her a purse heavy with thrones] "I would be very surprised indeed. And I would be eager to purchase it."

traits.locale_text: [Ona tahtlarla dolu bir çanta verin]. "Gerçekten çok şaşırırdım. Ve onu satın almak için can atardım."
